creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-05-22 00:03:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/sublib    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  SubLib is a library that eases the development of subtitling applications. It
  supports the most common text-based subtitle formats and allows for subtitle
  editing, conversion and synchronization.
  
  SubLib is written in C# and can be used in platforms like Mono or .NET
  Framework.
  
  WWW: http://sublib.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/123825
  Submitted by:   Marcin Simonides <marcin at studio4plus.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.264     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/multimedia/sublib/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/sublib/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/multimedia/sublib/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/multimedia/sublib/pkg-plist (new)
